data_description.host: The IP address of your LNK2 WiFi module.
data_description.password: The device password set in the Rain Bird app.

reauth_confirm.description: The Rain Bird device rejected the stored password.

error.device_busy: The controller is busy talking to another client. Close the Rain Bird app and try again.

abort.no_mac: This controller did not report a MAC address, which is required to identify it.

init.title: Rain Bird Advanced options
init.description: Flow rates are used to estimate watering volume. Leave a zone at 0 to leave its volume unknown. There is no flow meter: these are estimates.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the controller. Runs shorter than this interval are not recorded.

raw_command.name: Raw command
raw_command.description: Send an arbitrary command to the controller, for protocol exploration and debugging. Admin only. Read commands run as-is; commands that act on the controller require 'Allow unsafe commands'.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: The controller to send the command to.

command.name: Command
command.description: A SIP command name from pyrainbird (e.g. ModelAndVersionRequest), or a JSON-RPC method name (e.g. getSettings) when mode is rpc.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: sip sends an encoded SIP command; rpc calls a zero-argument JSON-RPC method.

params.name: Parameters
params.description: Positional integer parameters for the SIP command. Ignored in rpc mode.

allow_unsafe.name: Allow unsafe commands
allow_unsafe.description: Required for commands that act on the controller instead of reading from it, such as starting or stopping watering or changing the clock. Leave off while exploring.
